messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for bilateral upper blepharoplasty for member NH-214569 to improve the tired appearance of the eyes. Attached: plastic surgeon consultation notes and photographs. No visual field testing is provided; the stated goal is cosmetic improvement.
